---
title: "GV300 Showcase"
author:
  - name: "Muhammad Ahmad Hassan"
output: distill::distill_article
---
# Introduction

This page presents selected work from GV300 (Advanced Quantitative Politics).  
It demonstrates my ability to analyse data in R and communicate results clearly.

# Example Analysis

Here I will include:
- Data visualisations
- Statistical models
- Interpretation of results
